title: Friday Delights
excerpt: Normally I don't try to cram in too many random things into 1 post, but since we're wrapping up my Signature Series book launch party - and it's Friday, what the heck. Plus, who says we can't squeeze all this…
body:
Normally I don't try to cram in too many random things into 1 post, but since we're wrapping up my Signature Series book launch party - and it's Friday, what the heck. Plus, who says we can't squeeze all this goodness into one post? It's a layout share plus 3 awesome giveaways!

New Garden Girl layouts just went up at Two Peas in a Bucket.

Everyday Life Matters || Copyright Two Peas in a BucketGIVEAWAY ITEMS: I had the pleasure of contributing to May Flaum's new eBook, Fashionably Fast. See how easy it can be to accelerate your scrapbooking process without sacrificing artistry. Here's a look at one of the projects.

Another wonderful self-paced class, from Big Picture Classes is The Ties That Bind taught by Stephanie Howell. Learn to identify and treasure the relationships in your life, both big and small, while creating authentic and meaningful scrapbook layouts in five vital relationship categories. Above all, learn to share a little piece of your heart on every page you make.

AC Digitals is the new online home for digital products by many of the American Craftsbrands - including Crate Paper, Pebbles, Project Life, and American Crafts, of course! Three of my Amy Tangerine signature lines are currently available for sale there, the most recent one being Sketchbook which was just released this week!

To celebrate my collections being available there, AC Digitals is pleased to offer my readers the chance to win the full digital collection for free! Sketchbook will be 20% off through Sunday night in honor of its' debut in the shop.

GIVEAWAYS: So there are 3 giveaways up for grabs. Please specify in the comments if you'd like to win 1 in particular, or if you are game for all 3. Giveaways will close tomorrow morning (Saturday March 2) at 9am PST and winners will be announced shortly after. Happy Friday and good luck! 

Sorry for the delay in announcing the winners:

1) May's ebook - #44 - Sarah says: March 1, 2013 at 12:39 pm Holy giveaways batman! I’m not picky at all! I would be super grateful if I won any of them! Thanks for the chance to win! 

2) Stephanie's class - #63 - Nathalie says: March 1, 2013 at 5:30 pm I LOVE your new page!!! LOVE it! and I would love to win a spot in Stephanie’s class!!! 

3) AC Digitals - #52 - Jeana Sealock says: March 1, 2013 at 3:17 pm Wow, love them all but I think digitals are my favorite :) Thanks for the chance to win :)
